_doc: FROZEN Stage-1 pretraining config (C4 + early MusicPile exposure). Fields consumed by j_pretrain.config.schemas.StageConfig; keys starting with _ are human notes ignored by from_json.
_provenance_detail: Optimizer betas/clip/precision EXPLICIT_PAPER (Table 5). peak_lr/min_lr/warmup_steps/global_batch_seqs/weight_decay are LOCAL_REPRODUCTION_CHOICE seeded by the paper's 1B-model Stage-1 reference (Table 6: peak 5e-4, min 5e-5, warmup 1000, global batch 512) since the 135M Stage-1 schedule is UNKNOWN. Disclosed as a limitation in every report.
_max_tokens_note: max_tokens here (9.0B) is a NOMINAL upper bound. Actual per-run total tokens = 8.7B fixed C4 + lambda*300M MusicPile (ADD policy). The orchestrator computes each run's total_optimizer_steps from the Stage1Plan length (n_c4+n_mp windows)//global_batch_seqs and passes it to Trainer; the cosine horizon is per-run (peak/min/warmup identical across lambda).
